item.text: {"modelVerdict":"FAIL","summary":"The bounded evidence supports recorded local simulated test execution, an accurately disclosed simulated Review Gate, and visible evidence-state boundaries. It contradicts claims of CI execution, completion of every external gate, and full Phase-0 mission alignment because CI and multiple external checks were not run, while the required durable rejected-payment audit record is neither implemented nor tested.","claimAudits":[{"id":"TEST_EXECUTION","modelAssessment":"SUPPORTS","rationale":"The recorded output identifies the Node test command, exit code 0, two named passing tests, and zero failures. The test source contains corresponding assertions for payment idempotency, tampered-token rejection, and rejection of unverified payment events. This supports the claim of recorded local simulated test execution, without establishing production or external-system behavior.","citedEvidencePaths":[".controltower/governed-test-output.txt","tests/invoiceflow.test.js","CONTROL_TOWER_REPORT.json","docs/EVIDENCE_REPORT.md"],"counterEvidence":[],"missingEvidence":[],"recommendedNextAction":"Retain the test source and captured output together as bounded evidence, preserving the explicit simulated/local limitation."},{"id":"CI_EXECUTION","modelAssessment":"CONTRADICTS","rationale":"The report marks CI as FAIL with no evidence, lists CI under not-run verification, and raises a high-severity NO_CI risk because no CI configuration exists. The NOT_RUN documentation does not provide any CI completion record.","citedEvidencePaths":["CONTROL_TOWER_REPORT.json","docs/NOT_RUN_GATES.md"],"counterEvidence":["CONTROL_TOWER_REPORT.json records evidenceStatus.ci as FAIL with evidence null, lists CI as not run, and reports NO_CI."],"missingEvidence":["No CI workflow configuration, CI run identifier, automation log, or CI result is present in the allowed evidence."],"recommendedNextAction":"Add an approved minimal CI workflow and capture its run result before claiming recorded CI execution."},{"id":"REVIEW_GATE","modelAssessment":"SUPPORTS","rationale":"The report and gate file consistently disclose an APPROVED but simulated local-file review, name the simulated reviewer, define scope and forbidden actions, and explicitly state that reviewer identity was not verified and that the gate is not enterprise identity verification.","citedEvidencePaths":["CONTROL_TOWER_REPORT.json",".controltower/review-gate.json"],"counterEvidence":[],"missingEvidence":[],"recommendedNextAction":"Continue labeling the gate as simulated and local; require a separately authenticated human decision before treating it as a real organizational approval."},{"id":"EVIDENCE_BOUNDARY","modelAssessment":"SUPPORTS","rationale":"The evidence visibly distinguishes executed PASS results, CI FAIL, numerous NOT_RUN gates, and the overarching SIMULATED mode. The evidence report also limits passing results to local simulated flows and explicitly denies production, persistence, deployment, scale, and real-provider validation.","citedEvidencePaths":["CONTROL_TOWER_REPORT.json","docs/EVIDENCE_REPORT.md","docs/TRACEABILITY_MATRIX.md","docs/NOT_RUN_GATES.md"],"counterEvidence":[],"missingEvidence":[],"recommendedNextAction":"Preserve the explicit PASS, FAIL, NOT_RUN, and SIMULATED labels in future summaries so none are collapsed into a general completion claim."},{"id":"EXTERNAL_GATES","modelAssessment":"CONTRADICTS","rationale":"External and environment-dependent gates are explicitly recorded as NOT_RUN, including real identity-provider testing, real payment-provider testing, browser/accessibility, load/concurrency, deployment, and independent security review. Therefore, not every listed external verification gate has completion evidence.","citedEvidencePaths":["CONTROL_TOWER_REPORT.json","docs/NOT_RUN_GATES.md"],"counterEvidence":["docs/NOT_RUN_GATES.md marks real identity-provider, real payment-provider, browser/accessibility, load/concurrency, and deployment gates NOT_RUN.","CONTROL_TOWER_REPORT.json lists browser/accessibility, load/concurrency, deployment, and independent security review as not run."],"missingEvidence":["No completion output is provided for the listed external gates."],"recommendedNextAction":"Keep these gates NOT_RUN until each receives separately approved scope and recorded execution evidence."},{"id":"MISSION_CHANGE_TEST_ALIGNMENT","modelAssessment":"CONTRADICTS","rationale":"Several criteria have a coherent chain: signed local sessions are implemented in auth code, tampering is asserted, and the named test is recorded as passing; verified and idempotent simulated payments are implemented, asserted, and included in the passing output; governance and traceability documents are present. However, the stated success criteria also require a durable local audit record for every rejected payment attempt. Payments reject invalid attempts by throwing errors but create no audit record, the test contains no audit assertion, and the roadmap, traceability matrix, evidence report, and NOT_RUN list all explicitly mark this requirement unimplemented or NOT_RUN. Thus every success criterion is not semantically demonstrated.","citedEvidencePaths":["CONTROL_TOWER_REPORT.json","src/auth.js","src/payments.js","tests/invoiceflow.test.js",".controltower/governed-test-output.txt","docs/TRACEABILITY_MATRIX.md","docs/EVIDENCE_REPORT.md","docs/TECH_DEBT_DELTA.md","plans/master-roadmap.md","docs/NOT_RUN_GATES.md",".controltower/review-gate.json"],"counterEvidence":["src/payments.js throws on rejected payment attempts but contains no durable audit-record operation.","tests/invoiceflow.test.js asserts rejection of an unverified event but does not assert creation or persistence of an audit record.","docs/TRACEABILITY_MATRIX.md marks the durable rejected-payment audit requirement NOT_RUN with no implementation or focused assertion.","docs/EVIDENCE_REPORT.md states that durable rejected-payment auditing has no implementation, focused assertion, or command output.","plans/master-roadmap.md marks IFM-06 NOT_RUN, and docs/NOT_RUN_GATES.md confirms that no persistence mechanism or focused assertion exists."],"missingEvidence":["A durable local audit implementation for every rejected payment path.","Focused assertions covering audit creation and durability across relevant lifecycle boundaries.","Recorded output showing those audit assertions passing.","A traceability link connecting the durable-audit criterion to implementation, assertion, and output."],"recommendedNextAction":"Under a newly approved bounded persistence scope, implement rejected-payment audit recording, add focused durability assertions for each rejection path, capture their output, and update traceability before claiming Phase-0 completion."}],"nextSafeAction":"Do not claim full mission or external-gate completion; preserve the supported local simulated results and obtain approval for a bounded durable-audit implementation and test mission."}
